title: Maa Mahagauri Mantra
intro: Read the Maa Mahagauri Mantra with meaning. Chant this mantra with devotion to receive the grace of Mother Mahagauri.
description:
Main Mantra

Om Devi Mahagauryai Namah.

English Meaning

Om,
I bow to
Goddess Mahagauri.

faq.q1: When should Maa Mahagauri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a1: Maa Mahagauri Mantra is considered auspicious when chanted in the morning or on the eighth day of Navratri.
faq.q2: How many times should Maa Mahagauri Mantra be chanted?
faq.a2: It is commonly chanted 11, 21, 51, or 108 times.
faq.q3: What are the benefits of chanting Maa Mahagauri Mantra?
faq.a3: According to Hindu tradition, chanting this mantra is believed to bring peace, happiness, prosperity, and the blessings of Maa Mahagauri.
faq.q4: Can Maa Mahagauri Mantra be chanted daily?
faq.a4: Yes, Maa Mahagauri Mantra can be chanted every day with devotion.
faq.q5: Can anyone chant Maa Mahagauri Mantra?
faq.a5: Yes, anyone may chant Maa Mahagauri Mantra with faith and devotion.
